TestCase z33Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_b = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    // ------------------------------------
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        if (follow_case.b[i] != 0.0) {
            follow_case.b[i] /= 3.0;
        }
    }
    return follow_case;
}
